author: mpoffizial
title: object-typed callable dependencies defeat static analysis
notes: Core claim confirmed: 7 fields across CodexBatchRunnerDeps, FollowupScanDeps, and _AttemptContext use `object` for callables, with 17 production call sites in 2 files. This genuinely defeats mypy/pyright checking. However, scope overstated (1 type file, not 6+ runner files; 17 call sites, not 20+). Impact is moderate — contained to batch runner internals, not a codebase-wide pattern. Fix is trivial (Callable/Protocol). Real but low-severity typing hygiene issue.
